title: campanula fenestrellata subsp. fenestrellata
intro:
Campanula fenestrellata subsp. fenestrellata, also known as Fenestra campanula or Fenestral Harebell, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula.

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic agent. The health benefits of Campanula fenestrellata subsp. fenestrellata include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
